name: Xitlali Lopez
ai_summary: Xitlali Lopez is a certified kindergarten teacher with 10 years of education experience, including elementary education and curriculum instruction degrees, seeking part-time to full-time daycare roles in Phoenix. She applies her teaching expertise to conflict resolution by identifying root causes and guiding children toward constructive alternatives.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Talia Lopez and I am a current kindergarten teacher. I have my bachelor's in elementary education. I hold an early childhood endorsement and have a masters in curriculum and instruction. I have been working in education field for about 10 years. With only five of those have been as a teacher. I have previously worked as a Pre-K teacher. So I have worked with kids in from the range of, like, 4 to 6. I enjoy working with children because they are like, little people to me and they are learning how the world works.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Phoenix Arizona. I would say it is like I'm Central and Phoenix so I would be comfortable traveling but to both the East Valley and the West Valley. So like gillberg Glendale Chandler and Mesa Scottsdale, I would be open to traveling to these areas.
transcripts.q5: At the moment, I am looking for a part-time position, meaning I could week evenings and weekends. For the meantime, I do plan on the summer working full-time, my availability at the moment is I guess I am, as I mentioned, I am a teacher. But again, I am willing to work evenings and weekends, but one summer time comes, I am available to work more hours.
transcripts.q6: When dealing with conflict, I like to know what happened, that led to that situation, as it will help us find the root of the problem. For example, I want to know if there was a problem with sharing, was it a problem with not being able to communicate needs, like they could not get to tell the other student like they wanted to turn or something like that, from there. I walk the children through how hitting using kind, there are other ways of achieving what we need and kind of walk them through it. I always have the child apologize and remind them of a safe or Tuesday could do instead, Rather than hitting.
transcripts.q7: I would appreciate the opportunity to be an acute teacher because I am passionate about teaching and to really enjoy working with children. I love the idea of being able to help a daycare in my community and not being able to worry about lesson plans. It is the absolute dream job for a teacher.
